message:
test(search-core): add 27 tests for rollout controls and shadow comparison

Expand rollout.rs from 10 to 37 tests covering:
- ShadowComparison: serde roundtrip, partial overlap (50%),
  both-empty inputs, asymmetric inputs, latency delta sign
- v3_is_better: faster+good overlap (true), slower (false),
  with error (false), low overlap (false)
- is_equivalent: boundary at 80%, below at 70%, error blocks
  despite full overlap
- compute_kendall_tau: single shared (0.0), empty shared (0.0),
  partial agreement (2/3)
- ShadowMetrics: Default is empty, new() == default, records
  v3 errors with percentage, equivalent percentage calculation
- ShadowMetricsSnapshot: serde roundtrip with negative delta
- RolloutController: Default trait, config accessor, metrics
  after recording, fallback_on_error configurable, shadow_mode
  Off, semantic kill switch degrades engine
- Top-10 overlap verification with 20-element result sets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
